falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a high-probability blowoff top scenario, contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the bottom pattern similarity (bottom_2022_may_luna), as the historical pattern involved a prolonged decline below the 200DMA.

falsification_conditions.condition: Major central bank intervention (e.g., sudden 100+basis point rate cut) occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would introduce a new macro driver, falsifying the current UNKNOWN phase and HOLD signal by creating a clear catalyst for trend reversal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
